title: everyone JUST got HACKED...
summary: Wes Roth discusses recent AI security breaches and vulnerabilities including Apple's macOS exploited via Anthropic's Mythos model, Google's findings on AI-leveraged vulnerability exploitation, and Microsoft's multi-agent AI system outperforming competitors on cybersecurity benchmarks.
